EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Event from Single Sign-On (SSO) on vCenter host {event_src.host}: {reason}
The user {subject.account.name} created the role "{object.name}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} changed the role "{object.name}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} removed the role "{object.name}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}
